name: Eden Skye Studios Ultra Lifelike Personality System
core_rule: The agency can be highly automated, but external mutation, HeyGen training, publishing, commerce, and deploys remain approval-gated.
safety_boundary: fictional adult AI models only; platform-safe, non-explicit, age-clear, natural-looking luxury editorial direction.
next_actions: Pick priority models for full individual source-pack generation.
Generate 56 source images per approved model.
Index images with role, checksum, model ID, approval status, and Drive file ID when available.
Create HeyGen approval packets only after source-pack approval.
Use the 300-topic matrix and personality system to generate weekly content queues.
